title: Brevo vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo vs Sendinblue: pricing, features, and performance. See which email marketing platform suits your needs best.
h1: Brevo vs Sendinblue: Complete Comparison Guide
intro: Brevo and Sendinblue are closely related platforms offering comprehensive email marketing, SMS, and CRM capabilities. In fact, Sendinblue rebranded to Brevo in 2022, making this comparison important for users deciding between the current Brevo platform and legacy Sendinblue references. Both tools cater to businesses seeking affordable, feature-rich marketing automation solutions.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, CRM, Live Chat, Transactional API
comparison_table.tool_b: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, CRM, Chat, Transactional API

choose_a_if: You want the actively maintained, modern version with the latest features and improvements
You need comprehensive live chat functionality alongside email marketing
You prefer a platform that's being actively developed with regular updates and new capabilities
choose_b_if: You're looking for legacy documentation or have existing integrations with Sendinblue-specific systems
You specifically need the 300 free emails per day structure for testing
You prefer the historical branding for organizational continuity

faq.a: Brevo is the current iteration of Sendinblue following its 2022 rebrand. Brevo offers the same core functionality with additional features like enhanced live chat capabilities and an expanded multi-channel approach. If you're considering a new platform, Brevo is the recommended choice as it represents the actively maintained version.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Both platforms have identical pricing structures starting at $0 for the free tier and $25/month for paid plans. The cost difference is negligible, making pricing a tie between the two. Your choice should be based on features and platform maturity rather than cost.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Brevo?
faq.a: Since Brevo is the rebranded version of Sendinblue, existing Sendinblue users have already transitioned to Brevo. If you're currently on Sendinblue, your account is now managed through the Brevo platform. New users should sign up directly with Brevo for the best experience and access to the latest features.
